news.headline: DC gala shooting: What we know about the suspect
news.summary: Investigators on Sunday said the gunman who tried to storm a gala dinner attended by US President Donald Trump planned to assassinate him and multiple top officials, as scrutiny grew over the event's security.  Here is what we know about the suspect.

news.headline: Reopen Strait of Hormuz by reframing Iran’s tolls as reconstruction
news.summary:
The Strait of Hormuz is usually described as a chokepoint. Today, it is more than that. It is the hinge point between war and peace in the Gulf.
